docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KIM ANDERSON IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CARMEN ADAMS. DEFENDANT CAROLE EISERLOH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS VINCENT EISERLOH. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF CONTRACTED THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPT TO SERVICE DEFENDANT, BUT NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES AND CONFIRMS SHERIFF SERVICE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT EISERLOH, CAROLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, KIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EISERLOH, CAROLE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00, CLEANING OF DUST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
